case.title: OSWALD v. STATE OF NEW YORK

opinion.h: OSWALD v. STATE OF NEW YORK, 2 U.S. 401 (1792)
Oswald, Administrator v. the State of New York
opinion.p: Summons. In this case the Marshall had returned the writ served; and now Sergeant moved for a distringas, to compel an appearance on the part of the State.
While, however, the court held the motion under advisement, it was voluntarily withdrawn, and the suit discontinued.*
[Footnote *] But see the same suit post, and Grayfen versus Virginia.[ Oswald v. State of New York
